revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
revision.text: {{Commons category}} {{Birth year category header|192|4}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: {{Commons category}} {{Birth year category header|192|4}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixing the category recursion error
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category}} {{Birth year category header|192|4}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:40:20
revision.text: {{Commons category}} {{Birth year category header|192|4}}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9712628)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Commons category}} {{Birth year category header|192|4}} {{wikidata link|Q9712628}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:1924 births]] [[ja:Category:1924年生]] [[ab:Category:1924 шықәсазы ииз]] [[af:Category:Geboortes in 1924]] [[an:Category:1924 (naixencias)]] [[ar:Category:مواليد 1924]] [[ary:Category:زيادة 1924]] [[arz:Category:مواليد 1924]] [[ast:Category:Persones nacíes en 1924]] [[ay:Category:Asu 1924]] [[azb:Category:۱۹۲۴-جو میلادی ایلده دوغولان‌لار]] [[az:Category:1924-cü ildə doğulanlar]] [[bar:Category:Geboren 1924]] [[ba:Category:1924 йылда тыуғандар]] [[be:Category:Нарадзіліся ў 1924 годзе]] [[bg:Category:Родени през 1924 година]] [[bh:Category:1924 में जनम]] [[bjn:Category:Kalahiran 1924]] [[bn:Category:১৯২৪-এ জন্ম]] [[bpy:Category:মারি ১৯২৪-এ উজ্জিসিতা]] [[br:Category:Ganedigezhioù 1924]] [[bs:Category:Rođeni 1924.]] [[ca:Category:Naixements del 1924]] [[cdo:Category:1924 nièng chók-sié]] [[ceb:Category:Mga natawo sa 1924]] [[ce:Category:Бинарш 1924 шарахь]] [[ckb:Category:لەدایکبووانی ١٩٢٤]] [[commons:Category:1924 births]] [[crh:Category:1924 senesinde doğğanlar]] [[cs:Category:Narození v roce 1924]] [[cv:Category:1924 çулта çуралнисем]] [[cy:Category:Genedigaethau 1924]] [[da:Category:Født i 1924]] [[de:Category:Geboren 1924]] [[diq:Category:Merdumê ke 1924 de biyê]] [[dsb:Category:Roź. 1924]] [[eo:Category:Naskiĝintoj en 1924]] [[es:Category:Nacidos en 1924]] [[et:Category:Sündinud 1924]] [[eu:Category:1924ko jaiotzak]] [[fa:Category:زادگان ۱۹۲۴ (میلادی)]] [[fi:Category:Vuonna 1924 syntyneet]] [[fon:Category:Jì ɖò xwè 1924 tɔn mɛ]] [[fo:Category:Føðingar í 1924]] [[fr:Category:Naissance en 1924]] [[fy:Category:Persoan berne yn 1924]] [[gan:Category:1924年出世]] [[ga:Category:Daoine a rugadh i 1924]] [[gl:Category:Nados en 1924]] [[gu:Category:૧૯૨૪માં જન્મ]] [[guw:Category:Ovi he ye ji to owhe 1924 lẹ]] [[gv:Category:Ruggyryn 'sy vlein 1924]] [[ha:Category:Haifaffun 1924]] [[he:Category:ילידי 1924]] [[hif:Category:1924 janam]] [[hi:Category:1924 में जन्मे लोग]] [[hsb:Category:Rodź. 1924]] [[ht:Category:Nesans nan lane 1924]] [[hu:Category:1924-ben született személyek]] [[hy:Category:1924 ծնունդներ]] [[hyw:Category:1924 ծնունդներ]] [[iba:Category:Pengada 1924]] [[id:Category:Kelahiran 1924]] [[ilo:Category:1924 a pannakaipasngay]] [[is:Category:Fólk fætt árið 1924]] [[it:Category:Nati nel 1924]] [[jv:Category:Lair 1924]] [[ka:Category:დაბადებული 1924]] [[kcg:Category:Byin 1924]] [[kk:Category:1924 жылы туғандар]] [[kn:Category:೧೯೨೪ ಜನನ]] [[ko:Category:1924년 출생]] [[ku:Category:Jidayikbûn 1924]] [[kv:Category:Чужисны 1924 воын]] [[kw:Category:Dinethyansow 1924]] [[ky:Category:Туулгандар 1924-жылы]] [[la:Category:Nati 1924]] [[lb:Category:Gebuer 1924]] [[lez:Category:1924 йисуз дидедиз хьанвайбур]] [[lmo:Category:Nassud in del 1924]] [[ln:Category:Mbótama na 1924]] [[lv:Category:1924. gadā dzimušie]] [[mdf:Category:Шачсь 1924 кизоня]] [[mg:Category:Teraka tamin'ny taona 1924]] [[min:Category:Lahia 1924]] [[mk:Category:Родени во 1924 година]] [[ml:Category:1924-ൽ ജനിച്ചവർ]] [[mn:Category:1924 онд төрсөн]] [[mr:Category:इ.स. १९२४ मधील जन्म]] [[ms:Category:Kelahiran 1924]] [[mt:Category:Twieldu fl-1924]] [[myv:Category:Чачозь 1924 иестэ]] [[my:Category:၁၉၂၄ မွေးဖွားသူများ]] [[mzn:Category:۱۹۲۴ بزائه‌ئون]] [[nah:Category:Otlacatqueh xiuhpan 1924]] [[nds:Category:Boren 1924]] [[ne:Category:सन् १९२४ मा जन्म]] [[nn:Category:Fødde i 1924]] [[no:Category:Fødsler i 1924]] [[nrm:Category:Naitaé en 1924]] [[ny:Category:1924 kubadwa]] [[oc:Category:Naissença en 1924]] [[olo:Category:Rodivunnuot vuvvennu 1924]] [[or:Category:୧୯୨୪ ଜନ୍ମ]] [[os:Category:1924-æм азы чи райгуырдис, уыдон]] [[pa:Category:ਜਨਮ 1924]] [[pdc:Category:Gebore 1924]] [[pl:Category:Urodzeni w 1924]] [[pnb:Category:1924 دے جم]] [[ps:Category:1924 زېږېدنې]] [[pt:Category:Nascidos em 1924]] [[qu:Category:Paqarisqa 1924]] [[ro:Category:Nașteri în 1924]] [[rue:Category:Уродили ся 1924]] [[ru:Category:Родившиеся в 1924 году]] [[sah:Category:1924 сыллаахха төрөөбүттэр]] [[sat:Category:᱑᱙᱒᱔ ᱨᱮ ᱡᱟᱱᱟᱢ ᱠᱚ]] [[sa:Category:१९२४ जननम्]] [[scn:Category:Nasciuti ntô 1924]] [[sco:Category:1924 births]] [[sd:Category:1924ع جون پيدائشون]] [[se:Category:Riegádeamit 1924]] [[shn:Category:ၵူၼ်းၸိူဝ်းၵိူတ်ႇ ပီ 1924]] [[sh:Category:Rođeni 1924.]] [[simple:Category:1924 births]] [[si:Category:1924 උපත්]] [[sk:Category:Narodenia v 1924]] [[sl:Category:Rojeni leta 1924]] [[smn:Category:Ive 1924 šoddâmeh]] [[sq:Category:Lindje 1924]] [[sr:Category:Рођени 1924.]] [[su:Category:Nu babar taun 1924]] [[sv:Category:Födda 1924]] [[sw:Category:Waliozaliwa 1924]] [[szl:Category:Rodzyńi we 1924]] [[ta:Category:1924 பிறப்புகள்]] [[te:Category:1924 జననాలు]] [[tg:Category:Зодагони соли 1924]] [[th:Category:บุคคลที่เกิดในปี พ.ศ. 2467]] [[tl:Category:Ipinanganak noong 1924]] [[tr:Category:1924 doğumlular]] [[ts:Category:1924 births]] [[tt:Category:1924 елда туганнар]] [[tum:Category:Ŵanthu ŵakubabika mu 1924]] [[uk:Category:Народились 1924]] [[ur:Category:1924ء کی پیدائشیں]] [[uz:Category:1924-yilda tugʻilganlar]] [[vec:Category:Nasesti inte el 1924]] [[vep:Category:Sündnuded vl 1924]] [[vi:Category:Sinh năm 1924]] [[vo:Category:Moteds ün
